title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 404.870 - Handicapped or disabled, discrimination against not allowed
text:
404.870.  Handicapped or disabled, discrimination against not allowed. — Nothing in sections 404.710 to 404.865 shall be construed to authorize, approve or condone discrimination against the handicapped or the disabled in the exercise of the authority of a durable power of attorney for health care.  Decisions based on factors listed in section 404.822 shall not be considered discriminatory.
(L. 1991 S.B. 148 § 1)
